trigger_keywords: olor a establo o sudor de caballo

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Brettanomyces yeast grows in susceptible wine or contaminated cellar equipment.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: It produces volatile phenols that can dominate the wine's aroma.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine may smell of stable, horse sweat, leather, medicinal compounds, or other animal notes.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine may smell of stable, horse sweat, leather, medicinal compounds, or other animal notes.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
